reviews.review_title: Its pretty good but the physics are odd
reviews.review_description: I like the way it is like backyard golf you play as kids. To the developers, you did pretty good on this game. I would recommend if you are patient.

The idea of a golf game using a hockey stick to hit soccer balls through football goalposts actually sounds like a good time, unfortunately it's pretty bland. The controls are clunky and not as dialed and responsive as a sports title needs to be. I ended up being frustrated more than I was enjoying my experience.
Physics are wack it’s a game of complete luck but it might be fun if you and some friends are up at 2am
I'm really bad at the game but I must say that it does keep me entertained. Although sometimes I do want to stick my hand into a fan, I find the game to be enjoyable.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot, the project will be back soon in a more professional way

reviews.review_description: It's a fun and challenging  game very enjoyable for family
